creator: lucas.kanashiro@collabora.com
text:
Created attachment 199183
Fix portlint warning and errors

Most of the warnings and errors were fixed:

$ portlint -C
WARN: Makefile: If you are using python and using autoplist you may remove the pkg-plist file.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.

Except by the above one. It suggests the removal of pkg-plist file because we are using autoplist but we also need to install some configuration files via pkg-plist. Is that ok if we ignore this warning?
